# bug_id: # RustPython known-crash catalog for the `known-issues` regression cross-reference.
# Two sources, both confirmed reproduced on the interpreter binary:
#   RUSTPY-*  fusil fuzzing campaign + CPython differential  (github.com/devdanzin/rustpython-findings)
#   RPYR-*    static review by this toolkit, then reproduced (github.com/devdanzin/rustpython-review-findings)
# Crash-kind sites only (panic/abort/segv); uncollectable-cycle LEAKS live in the findings
# repo, not here (a missing-traverse site is not a panic site). Drift-tolerant: verify an
# `absent`/`line_drifted` verdict by reading the file — some recursion/segv sites (e.g.
# RPYR-0013/0014 hash recursion, RPYR-0020 Debug cast) carry NO panic token, so a fresh
# panic-site scan reads them `absent` even though they are unfixed.
# --- RPYR-* (static-review findings, folded in to close the feedback loop) ---
